title: Make Me a Star
writer: Sam Mintz, Walter DeLeon, Arthur Kober
actors: Joan Blondell, Stuart Erwin, Zasu Pitts
plot: Merton Gill is longing to become a cowboy actor and leaves his hometown to try his luck in Hollywood, but there his acting ability is regarded as non-existent. Actress Flips gives him a chance in a bit part, but he fails in that; ...
